message:
Run button shows "Running…" + pulse during a bench run

Disabled-and-greyed wasn't enough feedback — it looked the same as
"this button is broken." Now: while a bench is in flight the button
text flips to "Running…" and the disabled state animates the same
1.2s cell-pulse rhythm the running cells already use, so the page
reads as one coherent "I'm busy" state. Reverts to "Run benchmark" /
"Run all workloads" when results land.

Verified through headless Chromium that the text actually changes
during the run window.
